parameters.content:
## Reminders – Upsert

**POST** `/webhook/reminders/upsert`

Creates or updates an internal calendar reminder. The API uses the same datetime field names as appointments. The UI may ask for duration, but it sends the calculated `end_datetime`.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "id": "optional-uuid",
  "title": "Llamar a laboratorio",
  "description": "Detalles opcionales",
  "start_datetime": "2026-05-13T13:45:00",
  "end_datetime": "2026-05-13T14:00:00",
  "color": "#8b5cf6",
  "priority": "MEDIUM",
  "status": "pending",
  "visibility": "clinic",
  "raise_alert": true,
  "created_by": "user-uuid"
}
```

This workflow only writes the `reminders` row. Alert generation is intentionally left to the alert workflows/rules, so this endpoint does not insert or update `alert_instances`.

**Response 200:** reminder row using the frontend contract.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO reminders (
  id,
  title,
  description,
  start_datetime,
  end_datetime,
  color,
  priority,
  status,
  visibility,
  raise_alert,
  created_by,
  completed_at,
  completed_by,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id_sql }},
  {{ $json.title_sql }},
  {{ $json.description_sql }},
  {{ $json.start_datetime_sql }}::timestamp,
  {{ $json.end_datetime_sql }}::timestamp,
  {{ $json.color_sql }},
  {{ $json.priority_sql }},
  {{ $json.status_sql }},
  {{ $json.visibility_sql }},
  {{ $json.raise_alert_sql }},
  {{ $json.created_by_sql }}::uuid,
  CASE WHEN {{ $json.status_sql }} = 'done' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
  CASE WHEN {{ $json.status_sql }} = 'done' THEN {{ $json.completed_by_sql }}::uuid ELSE NULL END,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE
SET title          = EXCLUDED.title,
    description    = EXCLUDED.description,
    start_datetime = EXCLUDED.start_datetime,
    end_datetime   = EXCLUDED.end_datetime,
    color          = EXCLUDED.color,
    priority       = EXCLUDED.priority,
    status         = EXCLUDED.status,
    visibility     = EXCLUDED.visibility,
    raise_alert    = EXCLUDED.raise_alert,
    completed_at   = CASE
                       WHEN EXCLUDED.status = 'done' THEN COALESCE(reminders.completed_at, NOW())
                       ELSE NULL
                     END,
    completed_by   = CASE
                       WHEN EXCLUDED.status = 'done' THEN COALESCE(EXCLUDED.completed_by, reminders.completed_by)
                       ELSE NULL
                     END,
    updated_at     = NOW();

SELECT
  id::text AS id,
  title,
  description,
  start_datetime::text AS start_datetime,
  end_datetime::text AS end_datetime,
  color,
  priority,
  status,
  visibility,
  raise_alert,
  alert_instance_id,
  created_by::text AS created_by,
  created_at::text AS created_at,
  updated_at::text AS updated_at,
  completed_at::text AS completed_at,
  completed_by::text AS completed_by
FROM reminders
WHERE id = '{{ $node["Parse Input"].json["id"] }}'::uuid
LIMIT 1;
